titleStmt.title: SII 17.721: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 721. (A.R. No. 664 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Subhānu, Makara, śu. Pūrṇimā, Friday, Punarpūśam, regularly correspond to 1403 A.D., December 28, Friday, ·64 ·84.

This records the gift of a share (viḻukkāḍu) of land in the village Aṇṇalūr in Veṇṇaiyūr nāḍu, by Vallaṅgiḻāṉ Śōḻappallavadaraiyaṉ Aruḷāḷanāthar-Śeyyanārāyaṇadēvaṉ of Ambattūr in Ambattūr-nāḍu to the deity Tirumullaivāyal-uḍaiya nāyiṉār, in Kāṉappēṟūr-nāḍu, in Vikkirama-śōḻavaḷanāḍu, for conducting the Tiruvūḍal festival on the seventh day of the festival in the month of Paṅguṉi.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . hariyararāyaṉukkuc cellāniṉṟa cupāṉu caṅvaṟcara makara nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum pūrnaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟ koṭṭam Āṉa vikkiṟamacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu cāṉappeṟur ṉāṭṭu Uṭai yār tirumullaivāyal Uṭaiya ṉāyiṉāṟku Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu Ampa
tturṉāṭṭu Ampattur vallaṅkiḻāṉ coḻap pallavataraiyaṉ Aruḷāḷaṉātar ceyya nārāyaṇa tevaṉeṉ kāṇi Utakapūṟuvap piṟamāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi veṇṇai
yūr nāṭṭu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa Aṇṇalūr Ūr Oṉṟāṉa karai nālil Eṉ viḻukkāṭu nālil Oṉṟum nāyiṉār tirupaṅkuṉit tiruṉāḷ tiruvūṭal tirunāḷ Eṉ Upaiyattukku tiru nāmattu
kkāṇi Āka Utakam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ Inta Utaka pūṟuvap paṭiye naṭattikkoṇṭu Eḻāntiru nāḷ tiruvūṭal tiruṉāḷ cantirātittavaraikku tāḻvaṟa naṭattikkoḷ
ḷavum Ippaṭikku tirumalaiyile cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ Aruḷāḷanātar ceyya nārāyaṇatevaṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai Aruḷāḷanātar ceyyanā
rāyaṇatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coḻap pallavataraiyaṉ Ulaku Uyyakkoṇṭār veṅkaṭattāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coḻa
p pallavataraiyar vaṭukanātar tiruveṅkaṭanātaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coḻappallava taraiyaṉ Aṟam vaḷartta nāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ip
paṭi Aṟiveṉ coḻappallavataraiyaṉ malai niṉṟa perumāḷ camaiya mutali Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coḻap pallavataraiyaṉ Ulaku toḻā niṉṟāṉeṉ IppaṭiaṟiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.721 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
